seo.title: AI Interaction
seo.description: Use the AiToEarn plugin for publishing, comments, and Agent automation. Comment search is under maintenance and temporarily unavailable.
seo.keywords: AI interaction, AiToEarn plugin, Rednote interaction, comment tasks, Agent automation

page.title: AI Interaction
page.description: Use the AiToEarn plugin for publishing, comments, and Agent automation. During comment search maintenance, AI Interaction is the primary entry.

filters.keywordPlaceholder: Enter a keyword such as a brand name, comment phrase, or product term
filters.searchCostNotice: Each search click costs {{cost}} credits. Changing filters will not send requests automatically, and loading more pages after a search does not charge again.
filters.searchDirtyNotice: Filters changed, click Search to confirm
filters.noteStatusHint: When enabled, hidden or deleted notes will be filtered out.
filters.searchPanelHint: Filter changes do not request automatically. Click search to refresh the list.

maintenance.title: Comment search is under maintenance and temporarily unavailable

results.title: Results
results.pending: Enter a keyword and run a search. The list will refresh with the current filters.
results.sampleHint: Sample data is shown here. Search a keyword to view real results; samples cannot be exported.
results.empty: No notes matched the current filters.

empty.title: Select a note on the left to inspect it
empty.description: This panel shows the note metrics, growth trend, hot words, and comment analysis in the same compact workspace.
empty.hintTrend: Growth trend: inspect daily changes across likes, favorites, comments, and shares.
empty.hintHotWords: Hot words: quickly understand which topics this note is connected to.
empty.hintComments: Comment analysis: filter by mention, hot words, sentiment, and the comment list.

hotWords.title: Note hot words
hotWords.description: Trending topic words extracted from the note to help identify the topic direction.

trend.title: Growth trend
trend.description: Daily changes of likes, comments, favorites, and shares.

commentMent.title: Comment mentions
commentMent.description: Selecting a mention tag refreshes both comment hot words and the comment list.

commentHotWords.title: Comment hot words
commentHotWords.description: Click a hot word to search comments, or filter it out from the current view.

comments.searchPlaceholder: Search comment text and press Enter or click search
comments.empty: No comments matched the current filters.
comments.clickHotWordHint: Click a hot word to search comments

overview.rankingHint: Overview: exposure, interactions, growth trends, and hot words help judge note value.

pluginGuide.title: What can the AiToEarn plugin do?
pluginGuide.description: Used with AiToEarn Web, the plugin handles publishing, comments, and Agent automation directly in the browser.

deepseek.title: DeepSeek foundation with better pricing
deepseek.description: DeepSeek powers the core model for stable results and lower costs. For frequent copy and comment generation, the savings become margin.

publishing.title: Rednote and WeChat Channels publishing
publishing.description: Start tasks in AiToEarn Web, then let the plugin publish content to Rednote and WeChat Channels.

commentAction.title: Comment tasks and one-click actions
commentAction.description: AiToEarn Web comment tasks can be completed in one click, including likes, saves, follows, and other common actions.

agentAssistant.title: Agent automation assistant
agentAssistant.description: The Agent can read code, understand webpage tasks, and write publishing copy or comment content based on your request.

pluginGuide.footerTip: All capabilities are triggered through AiToEarn Web or tutorials, then executed by the plugin in the browser.

export.dialogDescription: Export data by the current search filters. Search results are previewed online, and Excel export supports a custom row count.
export.name: Export title

feedback.insufficientCredits: This export is estimated to need {{cost}} credits. Your current balance is {{balance}} credits, so please recharge and try again.

empty.startSearch: Run a keyword search to display the note list here.

feedback.searchFailed: Search failed. Please try again later.
feedback.originalUnavailable: The original link is not available right now.
feedback.originalFailed: Failed to open the original note.
feedback.insufficientCredits: This search needs {{cost}} credits. Your current balance is {{balance}} credits, so please recharge and try again.
